explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to **structured mentions of named entities with contextual descriptors or actions** (such as "Hanzade Dogan, chairwoman of Turkish e-commerce company Hepsiburada," "Green Party Minister of State for Land Use and Biodiversity Pippa Hackett," or "senador Arístides Victoria Yeb, el gobern").

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears in multilingual news, reports, and formal announcements covering politics, business, legal actions, awards, and disasters. Examples span Spanish, English, Arabic, Hindi, Turkish, German, and Italian, often involving titles, organizations, geographic locations, or specific events paired with descriptive clauses or follow-up actions.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: High-activation texts consistently pair named entities (people, groups, places) with explanatory phrases detailing roles, actions, or outcomes. Low-activation examples either lack named entities entirely, present them without elaboration (e.g., "AFN national chief news conference"), or are fragmented/headline-style without contextual development.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects linguistically structured references where a specific entity is immediately elaborated upon with descriptive, positional, or event-driven information, suggesting a focus on **semantically dense, contextually anchored entity descriptions** common in formal prose.

results.plain_text: Ore 15,40 - Articolo in aggiornamento  AGI - È salito a 152 il numero delle persone rimaste ferite a Smirne, dove un sisma di magnitudo 6,7 ha causato il crollo di diversi edifici. Lo ha riferito all'agenzia Anadolu il dipartimento per la gestione delle emergenze. Fermo al momento a 4 il numero delle vittime nell'area di Bayrakli, nelle vicinanze della metropoli. La Protezione civile turca ha comunicato che le ricerche vanno avanti in 12 edifici colpiti.  La scossa, durata 45 secondi, è stata avvertita anche nella metropoli di Istanbul e nella città di Bursa oltre che nelle isole greche e in altre province occidentali come Usak, Denizli, Manisa, Balikesir, Aydin e Mugla, dove gli edifici hanno subito lievi danni.  A renderlo noto è stata la protezione civile turca, Afad, che ha anche specificato che la scossa si e' verificata nel'Egeo, a una profondità di 16,5km e a una distanza di 17 km dalla costa. In base alle prime notizie riferite dai media turchi, alcuni edifici di Smirne hanno riportato danni strutturali, mentre al momento non si registrano vittime e feriti. La Turchia e' percorsa da due faglie che la rendono un Paese ad altissimo rischio sismico.  L'Isola greca di Samos e il piccolo porto di Cesme, nella provincia turca di Smirne, sono stati investiti da uno tsunami generato dalla scossa. Secondo alcuni cronisti greci ci sono stati feriti e danni materiali nella città di Vathy a Samos.  "Sosteniamo i nostri cittadini colpiti dal terremoto con tutti i mezzi del nostro Stato". Lo ha dichiarato in un tweet il presidente turco, Recep Tayyip Erdogan, "Abbiamo preso provvedimenti per avviare il lavoro necessario nella regione con tutte le nostre istituzioni e ministri competenti", ha sottolineato il capo di Stato.

results.actual_text: enterramientos de cada víctima, como el hecho de que muchas de ellas estuvieran atadas con hilos hierro, algunas con grilletes en las
results.plain_text: Memoria de Mallorca ha anunciado que pondrá cuatro denuncias en los Juzgados de Palma y otras dos en los de Manacor, por crímenes contra la Humanidad, por las víctimas exhumadas en las fosas de Calvià, Llucmajor, Pou de s'Àguila, Marratxí, Porreres y Son Coletes. Las denuncias se basan en los informes científicos ya finalizados de las exhumaciones, informes arqueológicos, antropológicos y médico-forenses que certifican las causas de las muertes, todas por arma de fuego y con traumas peri mortem y con signos de violencia, explica la entidad en un comunicado. Se apoyan también en las posiciones en las que han sido halladas las víctimas y las características de los enterramientos de cada víctima, como el hecho de que muchas de ellas estuvieran atadas con hilos hierro, algunas con grilletes en las muñecas. Alegan además que el número de víctimas que se han encontrado, 218, confirman los crímenes contra la humanidad que representan las ejecuciones extrajudiciales, las desapariciones forzadas, los asesinatos, las torturas y la violencia ejercida de forma masiva y sistemática por las autoridades fascistas de la época contra las personas no afectos al régimen.  Denuncian crímenes contra la Humanidad por 218 víctimas de fosas en Mallorca  También en Noticias  Fuertes temblores causan la alarma en Marratxí y Santa Maria Una aplicación de alertas sísmicas de Chile detectó un terremoto en Mallorca El Instituto Geográfico Nacional confirma dos terremotos de magnitud 2,2 y 2,5 en Deià y Bunyola Los baleares tendrán que pagar 215 euros más por la subida 'en frío' del IRPF La Audiencia obliga a una madre a que su hijo venga a la Isla para ver a sus abuelos

results.actual_text: ë nevojë më as të presin dhe as të kërkojnë në një labirinti parkimi. Këta
results.plain_text: Pas disa vitesh testime, Stanley Robotics zyrtarisht vendosi flotën e robotëve në punë këtë javë në Aeroportin Saint Ekzyperi të Lionit.  Të gjithë ata që parkojnë makinat në hapësirën e robotëve duhet ti lënë në një kuti speciale në formë garazhi. Një prej robotëve të Stanley do të marrë makinën dhe ta dërgojë tek vendi i parkimit.  Kur udhëtari rikthehet, sistemi përdor informacioni e fluturimit dhe vendos kur tua kthejë makinën. Kompania thotë se qytetarët nuk kanë nevojë më as të presin dhe as të kërkojnë në një labirinti parkimi.  Këta robotë në formë valixheje kanë formë katrore dhe gjerësinë e një SUV të vogël. Esencialisht shërbejnë si rimorkiues duke vendosur krahë metalikë nën makinë që mbështeten tek gomat. Robotët mund të vendosin 50% më shumë makina në të njëjtën hapësirë sesa njerëzit duke i parkuar më afër njëra-tjetrës.  Aktualisht Stanley Robotics mbulon vetëm 500 hapësira parkimi por kompania thotë se dëshiron tu shërbejë 6,000 prej tyre. Nuk dihet se kur do të lançohet shërbime tek aeroportet e tjera por kanë filluar testimet në Duseldorf të Gjermanisë dhe aeroportin Sharl De Gol të Parisit, njofton PCW.  Një tjetër testim është planifikuar nga Stanley Robotics në Aeroportin Gatwick të Londrës në fund të këtij viti.

results.actual_text: NEW SALEM, Mass. (WWLP) – The New Salem Police Department reports
results.plain_text: NEW SALEM, Mass. (WWLP) – The New Salem Police Department reports seeing an increase of illegal dumping calls around town.  The New Salem Police Department is asking residents to report anyone illegally dumping trash and debris. A license plate number or description of the individual “would be extremely helpful,” and furthermore police are asking residents not to confront the suspect.  You can report illegal dumping to the New Salem Police Department’s dispatch center at 978-544-2141.

results.actual_text: The Spanish holiday island of Tenerife has been rocked by a swarm of earthquakes in
results.plain_text: The Spanish holiday island of Tenerife has been rocked by a swarm of earthquakes in the last week, sparking fears that volcano Mount Teide may be about to erupt. The tremors were clustered around the popular tourist village of Vilaflor on the slopes of the 12,000ft volcano, between 28 October and 31 October. Mount Teide's is the highest point in Spain, and the volcano with an 80 meter wide crater attracts around three million sunseekers a year to the island off the West African coast. The last time Mount Teide erupted was in 1909, and experts from the Volcanological Institute of the Canary Islands were quick to say this type activity is common in volcanoes that are not extinct and what scientists call the swarm of earthquakes were not that big. The largest measured 1.4 on the Richter scale, with most of the activity coming between 6km to 8km below sea level, meaning villagers did not feel them. In general, earthquakes above 5.4 cause slight damage to buildings, with widespread destruction coming with quakes at 7 or above on the Richter scale. "This swarm is similar to the other seismic swarms recorded in Tenerife since last June 2017 and as always it is important to emphasise, it does not represent any kind of concern to the population", the body wrote on their Facebook page. It added: "These types of swarms are common in active volcanoes." Experts say the recent run of earthquakes are linked to hydrothermal systems beneath the volcano that produce liquids and steam. In this system even small increases in pressure can lead to small earthquakes. A major volcanic eruption occurs when super-heated magma – a mixture of molten or semi-molten rock – from inside the earth is thrust to the surface.

The tremors were clustered around the popular tourist village of Vilaflor on the slopes of the 12,000ft volcano, between 28 October and 31 October.
predictions.reasoning: It names Tenerife, Mount Teide, and Vilaflor with descriptive details about the earthquake swarm and tourist location.
